creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
On Sun, Jun 03, 2007 at 01:56:44AM +0000, Charles wrote:
> I installed the FreeBSD bootloader to load FreeBSD and Windows.
> Every time the bootloader screen shows up, it beeps. I used to use
> Grub, and Grub doesn't have this problem. Actually GAG doesn't
> either. It's particularly annoying when you start your computer in
> the classroom, or late at home when everybody sleeps next to you.

It's a feature I wouldn't want to miss on my monitor-less devices.

Edwin
